parameters.name: fields
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ LastContact: new Date().toISOString(), Notes: 'Returning lead — submitted new intake form' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a legal intake classifier for Greenfield & Associates. Classify the case type from the description. Return JSON with fields: case_type (personal_injury, dui_defense, criminal_defense, family_law, other), confidence (0-1), urgency (low, standard, high, urgent), summary.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.case_info.description }], temperature: 0.2 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { ContactName: $json.contact.first_name + ' ' + $json.contact.last_name, CaseType: $json.ai_classification.case_type, Confidence: $json.ai_classification.confidence, Urgency: $json.ai_classification.urgency, Status: 'pending_review', RawData: JSON.stringify($json) } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: ':rotating_light: URGENT INTAKE — ' + $json.contact.first_name + ' ' + $json.contact.last_name + ' — ' + $json.ai_classification.case_type + ' — ' + $json.ai_classification.summary + ' — Requires immediate human review.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ first_name: $json.contact.first_name, last_name: $json.contact.last_name, email: $json.contact.email, phone: $json.contact.phone, case_type: $json.ai_classification.case_type, source: $json.source, notes: $json.ai_classification.summary, status: 'new_lead' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'accepted', message: 'Intake received — pending human review', review_id: $json.id || 'queued' }) }}

parameters.content:
## Client Intake Pipeline — Greenfield & Associates

**Pattern:** Webhook → Validate → Deduplicate → AI Classify → Human Review Gate → Route

- All decision-making goes through a human review queue before CRM writes
- AI classification provides recommendation only — humans approve
- Urgent cases trigger Slack alert for immediate attention
- Existing contacts get updated, not duplicated

## Human Review Gate

Every new intake is queued for human review before any CRM write happens.
The review queue lives in Airtable. An intake coordinator reviews and approves before the contact is created in Lawmatics.

This is a MANDATORY gate — no automated CRM writes without human approval.

## Validation Rules

- Requires: first_name, last_name, at least one of email/phone, case type, description
- Phone normalized to E.164
- Nulls/empty strings stripped
- Invalid submissions get 400 response immediately
